Test delta

⚠ This PR deletes one or more tests — confirm each removal is intended. Full diffs are on GitHub (links below); this is the summary + plain-English note.

tests/artist.test.js

4 tests deleted assertions changed view diff on GitHub ↗
deleted: the artist page shows Play and Shuffle header buttons Play opens the player on the artist source (ordered), now-playing = first track Shuffle on the artist source sends no client shuffle flag (backend owns it) the grid is reachable below the header — Up from the first tile lands on the actions
↳ Rewritten for the new shape, not weakened: the old tests asserted the Play/Shuffle header + album grid (both removed by TASK-322); the new ones assert the album-grouped song list, no Play/Shuffle, and tap-a-song → artist player. Assertion count went UP (17→25).

tests/companion-artist.test.js

13 tests deleted -4 assertions view diff on GitHub ↗
deleted: renders the artist name and label from the live context lists only this artist’s albums (ELO x2), not the other artist TASK-274: album tiles are full-width (grid is a single column) TASK-274: each album tile shows its cover art from /media/ TASK-274: an album with no poster shows the ♪ placeholder (no broken image) tapping an album teleports the TV — the companion follows to the album detail Play header sends the playArtist intent — drives the TV to the artist player Shuffle header sends the shuffle intent BUG-021: an artist reached via a rail shows that rail crumb (not the generic Music crumb) and retraces to it self-loads the artist albums from ?id (no TV echo) tapping an album opens detail locally (no select intent to the TV) BUG-029: a prefixed ?id=artist:<name> resolves to the clean name and its albums BUG-035: a ?artist=<name> entry (crumb path) seeds the artist and renders its albums
↳ Rewritten for the companion song list. The dropped tests covered surfaces that no longer exist on this page — the Play/Shuffle header, album tiles (TASK-274 cover art / full-width grid), and tap-album-opens-detail. The kept regressions (BUG-021 rail crumb, BUG-029 prefixed id, BUG-035 ?artist=, self-load) are re-asserted against the song list; a new test proves tap-a-song sends the play intent. Net −4 assertions only because the album-tile-specific checks are gone with the album grid.

tests/music.test.js

1 test deleted assertions changed view diff on GitHub ↗
deleted: selecting an artist drills into a grid of just that artist’s albums; an album opens its detail
↳ One artist test re-pointed: 'drills into an album grid' → 'drills into a song list grouped by album; tapping a song opens the player'. Assertions went UP (87→90).

tests/unit/artist-tracks.test.js

additions only view diff on GitHub ↗
↳ New unit test (mutation-killing) for the pure album-grouped song model core/artist-tracks.js — asserts order, album tags, null/empty-album skipping, title/poster.
